beats.text: If you remember one thing from today, what would it be?
What's the most important thing you learned?
options: Skip-counting is how I multiply by 2s, 5s, and 10s
Patterns help me check my answers
Graph scales were multiplication all along

condition.selected: Skip-counting is how I multiply by 2s, 5s, and 10s

beats.text: Skip-counting is your go-to strategy for multiplication. It'll keep working as the factors change.

condition.selected: Patterns help me check my answers

beats.text: Pattern-checking catches mistakes before they stick. That's powerful.

condition.selected: Graph scales were multiplication all along

beats.text: You've been multiplying longer than you realized. Graphs were the start.
That vocabulary gives you a way to talk about multiplication precisely.
